treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 4 mg PO 2X/WEEK and 3 mg PO 5X/WEEK (held after hospitalization)

treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient reports generally feeling well with no particular complaints after administration

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for evaluation of abdominal discomfort and other symptoms
Patient received IVF NS (1000 mL ordered) upon arrival to the floor
Discussion of treatment options with healthcare proxy, case manager, and medical team

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and interactive, ambulatory with assistance
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Recommended to follow up with primary care doctor and oncologist; get palliative care and hospice involvement
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Cancer is serious, benefits of fixing it may do more harm than good
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: To focus on maximizing life enjoyment at home
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient informed about the seriousness of the condition and the shared decision not to aggressively treat
